race.description: Charity Golf Day (Epilepsy Qld) 26 June (55) Hcp
race.comment: SHE'S BRUTAL (7) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 1.75 lengths from the winner in third over 1200m at Toowoomba. Nicely placed to take this out. CHEERFUL CAT (5) doesn't win out of turn but ran a nice race last time out over 1540m at Gold Coast Poly, finishing second and beaten only a head. Has the talent to find the winners' list. STATE A FACT (6) scored two back at Sunshine Coast Poly but was below his best last time when 11th over 1400m there. Has the ability to produce a better result. The well-related WEEKEND ARTIST (2) (half to G3 winner and G2 placed I'm All The Talk) was too good for a maiden field when resuming last start over 1400m at Sunshine Coast Poly, scoring by half a length. Danny Peisley was in the saddle on that occasion and retains the mount. Must be respected now that the penny has dropped.
